name: G2: Product Details + Reviews
description: Open a G2 product page and return product metadata plus a flattened list of reviews. Reads schema.org [itemprop='review'] entries (G2 still ships these) and extracts name/rating/review-count from the page chrome. Pure read.

help.summary: Fetch product metadata and visible-page reviews for a G2 product. Reads schema.org review markup; falls back to og:title/meta tags for product chrome.

parameters.name: product_url
parameters.description: Full G2 product URL — e.g. the .../products/<slug>/reviews canonical from g2/search. Trailing query strings (?utm=...) and #anchors are stripped automatically.

parameters.name: max_pages
parameters.description: How many review pages to walk. Each page yields ~10 reviews. Default 1 (just the landing page); pass 2–5 for deeper coverage.

help.returns: Object: { product: { name, description, rating, review_count, category, url }, reviews: [{ title, body, author, date, rating }], pages_walked }. body is the visible review text after stripping G2's prompt prefixes ('What do you like best...').
notes: G2 ships [itemprop='review'] / [itemprop='reviewBody'] schema markup — selectors target those first; CSS-class fallbacks only kick in if itemprop is missing.
Pagination uses ?page=<n> on the canonical URL — G2's pager is server-rendered so this is more reliable than clicking the next button (which sometimes lazy-loads via JS).
max_pages caps at 5 to avoid long runs and rate limiting.

browser_automation.description: Walk a G2 product page (and optional follow-up pages) and extract product chrome + reviews via JS.

sequences.name: g2_product_details_reviews
sequences.description: Navigate to product reviews page -> wait for review markup -> JS extract chrome + page 1 reviews -> optionally walk additional ?page=N pages.

steps.name: Extract product chrome + reviews; walk additional pages if requested
steps.script: const cleanArg = (v) => { const t = String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t) ? '' : t; }; const sleep = (ms) => new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms)); const norm = (v) => String(v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const stripPrompts = (text) => norm(text).replace(/^(What do you (like best|dislike) about [^?]+\?)+/i, '').trim(); const extractChrome = () => { const ogTitle = document.querySelector("meta[property='og:title']")?.getAttribute('content') || ''; const metaDesc = document.querySelector("meta[name='description']")?.getAttribute('content') || ''; const h1 = document.querySelector('h1')?.textContent || ''; const name = norm(ogTitle.replace(/^The G2 on\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*Reviews.*$/i, '')) || norm(h1.replace(/\s*Reviews.*$/i, '')); const ratingNode = document.querySelector("[itemprop='ratingValue']"); const countNode = document.querySelector("[itemprop='reviewCount']"); const ratingText = norm(ratingNode?.textContent || ''); const countText = norm(countNode?.textContent || ''); const ratingFromAria = (() => { const el = document.querySelector("[aria-label*='out of 5']"); const m = (el?.getAttribute('aria-label') || '').match(/(\d(?:\.\d+)?)\s*out of 5/); return m ? m[1] : ''; })(); const breadcrumb = document.querySelector("nav[aria-label*='breadcrumb']")?.textContent || ''; return { name: name || norm(h1) || 'N/A', description: norm(metaDesc) || 'N/A', rating: ratingText || ratingFromAria || 'N/A', review_count: countText || 'N/A', category: norm(breadcrumb) || 'N/A', url: location.href.replace(/#.*$/, '').replace(/\?.*$/, '') }; }; const extractReviews = () => { const items = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[itemprop='review']")); return items.map((item) => { const title = item.querySelector("[itemprop='name'], h3, h4")?.textContent || ''; const body = item.querySelector("[itemprop='reviewBody']")?.textContent || item.querySelector("[class*='review-body']")?.textContent || ''; const author = item.querySelector("[itemprop='author'], [class*='reviewer']")?.textContent || ''; const date = item.querySelector("time, [datetime]")?.getAttribute('datetime') || item.querySelector("time, [datetime]")?.textContent || ''; const ratingMeta = item.querySelector("[itemprop='ratingValue']")?.getAttribute('content') || item.querySelector("[itemprop='ratingValue']")?.textContent || ''; const ratingAria = (() => { const el = item.querySelector("[aria-label*='out of 5']"); const m = (el?.getAttribute('aria-label') || '').match(/(\d(?:\.\d+)?)\s*out of 5/); return m ? m[1] : ''; })(); return { title: norm(title) || 'N/A', body: stripPrompts(body) || 'N/A', author: norm(author) || 'N/A', date: norm(date) || 'N/A', rating: norm(ratingMeta) || ratingAria || 'N/A' }; }); }; const product = extractChrome(); const reviews = extractReviews(); const maxPagesRaw = cleanArg(arg0); const requestedMax = maxPagesRaw && /^[1-9]$/.test(maxPagesRaw) ? Math.min(parseInt(maxPagesRaw, 10), 5) : 1; const baseUrl = product.url.replace(/[?#].*$/, ''); let pagesWalked = 1; if (requestedMax > 1) { for (let page = 2; page <= requestedMax; page += 1) { const target = `${baseUrl}?page=${page}`; const res = await fetch(target, { credentials: 'same-origin' }); if (!res.ok) break; const html = await res.text(); const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html'); const items = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll("[itemprop='review']")); if (!items.length) break; for (const item of items) { const title = item.querySelector("[itemprop='name'], h3, h4")?.textContent || ''; const body = item.querySelector("[itemprop='reviewBody']")?.textContent || item.querySelector("[class*='review-body']")?.textContent || ''; const author = item.querySelector("[itemprop='author'], [class*='reviewer']")?.textContent || ''; const date = item.querySelector("time, [datetime]")?.getAttribute('datetime') || item.querySelector("time, [datetime]")?.textContent || ''; const ratingMeta = item.querySelector("[itemprop='ratingValue']")?.getAttribute('content') || item.querySelector("[itemprop='ratingValue']")?.textContent || ''; reviews.push({ title: norm(title) || 'N/A', body: stripPrompts(body) || 'N/A', author: norm(author) || 'N/A', date: norm(date) || 'N/A', rating: norm(ratingMeta) || 'N/A' }); } pagesWalked = page; await sleep(400); } } return { product, reviews, pages_walked: pagesWalked };
